scripts.build: jlpm run build:lib && jlpm run build:labextension
scripts.postinstall: node -e "var fs=require('fs');var rep=function(s){return s.replace(\"return filename.split('=')[1].trim();\",\"var v=filename.split('=')[1];return v?v.trim():null;\")};['node_modules/license-webpack-plugin/dist/WebpackModuleFileIterator.js','node_modules/@jupyterlab/builder/node_modules/license-webpack-plugin/dist/WebpackModuleFileIterator.js'].forEach(function(f){if(fs.existsSync(f)){fs.writeFileSync(f,rep(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8')))}})"
